mission.title: jaeger: Jaeger Agent metrics not returned
mission.description: Jaeger Agent metrics not returned. This issue affects 7+ users.

steps.title: Identify jaeger troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your jaeger deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger -n observability --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review jaeger configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant jaeger configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger
kubectl get configmap -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=jaeger
```
As per the [documentation](http://jaeger.readthedocs.io/en/latest/monitoring/) the Jaeger Agent should expose some metrics properly formatted for  Prometheus on `:5778/metrics` 

The Agent is started using:
```
docker run \
  --rm \

steps.title: Apply the fix for Jaeger Agent metrics not returned
steps.description:
This will fix #738 

I'm looking at adding a test to ensure the functionality will stay over time. I'll update the PR
```yaml
docker run \
  --rm \
  -p5775:5775/udp \
  -p6831:6831/udp \
  -p6832:6832/udp \
  -p5778:5778/tcp \
  jaegertracing/jaeger-agent:1.2 \
  /go/bin/agent-linux --collector.host-port=my-collector:some-port
```

steps.title: Confirm Jaeger Agent metrics not returned is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger -n observability --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n observability --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with jaeger installed or the issue environment reproducible.
